import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5001/api',withCredentials:true});// Auth
export const authAPI={register:data=>API.post('/auth/register',data),login:data=>API.post('/auth/login',data),logout:()=>API.post('/auth/logout'),getMe:()=>API.get('/auth/me'),updateProfile:data=>API.put('/auth/update-profile',data),changePassword:data=>API.put('/auth/change-password',data)};// Posts
export const postAPI={getFeed:params=>API.get('/posts',{params}),createPost:formData=>API.post('/posts',formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}}),getMyPosts:params=>API.get('/posts/my-posts',{params}),getPost:id=>API.get("/posts/".concat(id)),updatePost:(id,formData)=>API.put("/posts/".concat(id),formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}}),deletePost:id=>API.delete("/posts/".concat(id)),toggleLike:id=>API.post("/posts/".concat(id,"/like")),addComment:(id,data)=>API.post("/posts/".concat(id,"/comment"),data),getComments:id=>API.get("/posts/".concat(id,"/comments"))};// Admin
export const adminAPI={getDashboard:()=>API.get('/admin/dashboard'),getAllPosts:params=>API.get('/admin/posts',{params}),approvePost:id=>API.put("/admin/posts/".concat(id,"/approve")),rejectPost:(id,data)=>API.put("/admin/posts/".concat(id,"/reject"),data),deletePost:id=>API.delete("/admin/posts/".concat(id)),getAllUsers:params=>API.get('/admin/users',{params}),blockUser:(id,data)=>API.put("/admin/users/".concat(id,"/block"),data),unblockUser:id=>API.put("/admin/users/".concat(id,"/unblock")),deleteComment:id=>API.delete("/admin/comments/".concat(id))};// Logs
export const logAPI={getLogs:params=>API.get('/logs',{params}),getMySessions:()=>API.get('/logs/my-sessions')};export default API;
